raw.title: Masonry Lintel Design — ASD
raw.body_text: Project 💾 Save📂 Load 🖨 Summary📄 Full Calc⊞ Expand All⊝ Collapse Masonry Lintel Design — ASD Reinforced CMU Lintel · Allowable Stress Design per TMS 402-22 · MDG-2022 Example REK-06 TMS 402-22 §5.3 Beams & Lintels §8.3.2 Flexure ASD §8.3.5 Shear ASD ASCE/SEI 7-22 §2.4 Masonry wall above w = 519 lb/ft P = 17,390 lb a = 5.33 ft Pu = 6,583 lb (uplift) RL=11.0k RR=11.0k brg = 8″ ea. L = 10.67 ft (clear 10.0 ft + brg/12) 10.0 ft clear d = 52.0″ t = 55″ CMU LINTEL b×55″ (fully grouted) As, bot. As, top Masonry Lintel — Elevation 1. Material Properties CMU Nominal Size 6 in. CMU — b = 5.63 in. 8 in. CMU — b = 7.63 in. 10 in. CMU — b = 9.63 in. 12 in. CMU — b = 11.63 in. f'm (psi) 1,500 1,750 2,000 2,500 3,000 Steel Grade Grade 40 — Fs = 20,000 psi Grade 60 — Fs = 32,000 psi 2. Lintel Geometry Clear Opening Span (ft) Clear distance between face of supports Bearing Length Each End (in.) Min. 4 in. per TMS 402-22 §5.3.1.4 Total Lintel Depth t (in.) Multiples of 8 in. typical for CMU Effective Depth d (in.) d = t − cover (auto: t − 3.5 in.) Wall Width b (in.) Auto-filled from CMU size selection 3. Design Loads ASD Combined Service Enter ASD combined service load combinations per ASCE/SEI 7-22 §2.4. Include lintel self-weight and wall weight above in w. Check all applicable downward combinations: D+L, D+0.75L+0.75S, and D+0.7S per §2.4.1 — D+L or D+0.75L+0.75S may govern over D+0.7S when live load (L) or roof live/rain load (Lr, R) is significant (e.g., lintels under occupied floors, entries, or where roof live load controls over snow). Uplift combination: 0.6D+0.6W or 0.6D+0.7E per §2.4.1. Load Entry Mode Compute from distributed + concentrated loads Enter governing M and V directly w — Distributed Load (lb/ft) Self-weight + wall above (downward combo) P — Conc. Downward Load (lb) 0 if no concentrated load P Location from Left Support (ft) Midspan = L/2; auto-updates with span changes wu — Distributed (Uplift Combo) (lb/ft) Distributed load for uplift combination Puplift — Uplift Load (lb) Uplift from wind/seismic combo; 0 if N/A 4. Bottom Reinforcement Tension — Downward Number of Bottom Bars 1 Bar 2 Bars 3 Bars Bottom Bar Size #4 — As = 0.20 in² #5 — As = 0.31 in² #6 — As = 0.44 in² #7 — As = 0.60 in² #8 — As = 0.79 in² #9 — As = 1.00 in² 5. Top Reinforcement Tension — Uplift (if applicable) Number of Top Bars 1 Bar 2 Bars 3 Bars Top Bar Size #4 — As = 0.20 in² #5 — As = 0.31 in² #6 — As = 0.44 in² #7 — As = 0.60 in² #8 — As = 0.79 in² #9 — As = 1.00 in² ▶ Run All Checks ✔ All Checks Pass Max D/C = 0.938 | Lintel design is satisfactory per TMS 402-22 ASD. ⇄ ResultsLintel max moment: 53.75 kip-ft→Lintel max shear: 11.47 kips→Left reaction: 11.47 kips→Right reaction: 11.46 kips→Lintel line load: 519 lb/ft→Max D/C ratio: 0.94 Section & Material Properties Property Symbol Value Units Masonry Compressive Strength f'm 1,750 psi Em = 900f'm Em 1,575,000 psi Allow. Masonry Comp. Stress Fb=0.45f'm 787.5 psi Allow. Steel Tensile Stress Fs 32,000 psi Modular Ratio n=Es/Em 18.41 — Lintel Width (actual) b 7.630 in. Lintel Total Depth t 55.0 in. Effective Depth d 52.00 in. Design Span (clear+brg/12) L 10.667 ft (128.0 in.) Net Shear Area Anv=b×d 396.8 in² Load Entry — w=519.0 lb/ft, P=17,390 lb at a=5.33 ft Bottom Rebar As,bot 1 × #6 (As=0.440 in²) Top Rebar As,top 1 × #4 (As=0.200 in²) Design Demands 645,056 lb-in M — Downward (53,755 lb-ft) 11,468 lb V — Downward 28.91 psi fv — Shear Stress 30,021 psi fs — Steel Stress (bottom, downward) 364.46 psi fb — Masonry Comp. (top fiber, downward) 47.06 psi Fv — Allow. Shear 32,000 psi Fs — Allow. Steel 787.5 psi Fb — Allow. Masonry Comp. Stress 122,080 lb-in |M| — Uplift Combo (−) TOP tension 526 lb |V| — Uplift Shear Check Results — click “▸ Calc” to expand any check Check Code Reference Demand Capacity D/C Status Detail Shear — Downward M/Vd=1.000, γg=1.0 TMS 402-22 §8.3.5.1, Eq. 8-19/22/23 fv=28.91 psi Fv=47.06 psi 0.614 PASS ▶ Calc Steel Stress — Downward As=0.440 in², j=0.939, kd=9.50 in. TMS 402-22 §8.3.2.3 fs=30,021 psi Fs=32,000 psi 0.938 PASS ▶ Calc Masonry Comp. Stress — Downward Fb=0.45f'm, kd=9.50in., jd=48.83in. TMS 402-22 §8.3.2.2.1 fb=364.46 psi Fb=787.5 psi 0.463 PASS ▶ Calc Shear — Uplift |Vup|=525.6 lb TMS 402-22 §8.3.5.1, Eq. 8-19/22/23 fv=1.32 psi Fv=47.06 psi 0.028 PASS ▶ Calc Steel Stress (Top) — Uplift As,top=0.200 in², j=0.958 TMS 402-22 §8.3.2.3 fs,top=12,259 psi Fs=32,000 psi 0.383 PASS ▶ Calc Masonry Comp. Stress (Top)—Uplift kd=6.62in., jd=49.79in. TMS 402-22 §8.3.2.2.1 fb,top=97.10 psi Fb=787.5 psi 0.123 PASS ▶ Calc Engineering Notes: Design per TMS 402-22 ASD. Enter ASD load combinations per ASCE/SEI 7-22 §2.4 (e.g., D+0.7S for downward; 0.6D+0.6W for uplift). Effective span per TMS 402-22 §5.3.1.1: L = clear opening + bearing/12 (ft). Minimum bearing = 4 in. per §5.3.1.4; 8 in. is typical. Shear uses γg = 1.0 for lintels per §8.3.5.1.2 (lintels are not classified as partially grouted shear walls). Axial P = 0 assumed in shear equations. ASD flexure: compressive reinforcement is ignored (not laterally tied). Governing moment is the lesser of Ms (steel controls) and Mm (masonry controls). Self-weight of lintel + weight of masonry above opening must be included in w. Typical fully-grouted 8" CMU lintel: ~81 psf. Shear may be reduced to d/2 from face of support per §5.3.1.5. Uplift check: if the net midspan moment under the uplift combination is negative (tension in top), top bars are required. Top bars are typically placed in a bond beam at the roof diaphragm level. ⇄ Results Hub ⇄ Results Hub× Max D/C ratio0.938 Masonry Lintel Design — ASD · 7/11/2026 Copy Lintel line load519 lb/ft Masonry Lintel Design — ASD · 7/11/2026 Copy Right reaction11.46 kips Masonry Lintel Design — ASD · 7/11/2026 Copy Left reaction11.47 kips Masonry Lintel Design — ASD · 7/11/2026 Copy Lintel max shear11.47 kips Masonry Lintel Design — ASD · 7/11/2026 Copy Lintel max moment53.75 kip-ft Masonry Lintel Design — ASD · 7/11/2026 Copy Max D/C ratio1.037 Masonry ASD Design Calculator · 7/11/2026 Copy Required steel area0.415 in^2 Masonry ASD Design Calculator · 7/11/2026 Copy Allowable shear stress47.06 psi Masonry ASD Design Calculator · 7/11/2026 Copy Design shear0.964 kips Masonry ASD Design Calculator · 7/11/2026 Copy Design moment3.807 kip-ft Masonry ASD Design Calculator · 7/11/2026 Copy Anchor T+V Interaction0 Masonry Top-of-Wall Anchor — ASD | TMS 402-22 §8.1.4.3 · 7/11/2026 Copy Anchor Allow. Shear Bv3.162 kips Masonry Top-of-Wall Anchor — ASD | TMS 402-22 §8.1.4.3 · 7/11/2026 Copy Anchor Allow. Tension Ba2.662 kips Masonry Top-of-Wall Anchor — ASD | TMS 402-22 §8.1.4.3 · 7/11/2026 Copy
